    Index

    C G M N P U 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    C

    collectingNumFromGusser() - Method in class Umpire
    This method creates an object of the Guesser class and calls the Guesser.guessingNum() method to collect the number guessed by the Guesser and assigns the number to Umpire.numGuesser variable.
    collectingNumFromPlayers() - Method in class Umpire
    This method creates an object of the Player class and calls the Player.predictNum() method multiple times to collect the number predicted by the Players and assigns the number to Umpire.numPlayer1,Umpire.numPlayer2, and Umpire.numPlayer3 variables respectively.
    comparing() - Method in class Umpire
    Compares the number guessed by the Guesser with the numbers predicted by each player and declares the winnner(s) of the game.
    count - Static variable in class Player
    Tracks which player is currently predicting.

    G

    gNum - Variable in class Guesser
    This variable stores the number guessed by the user.
    Guesser - Class in Unnamed Package
    This class is responsible for taking the number input from the user and returning it to the caller.
    Guesser() - Constructor for class Guesser
     
    GuesserGame - Class in Unnamed Package
    This class contains the main method(The entry point of the program) and is responsible for starting the game.
    GuesserGame() - Constructor for class GuesserGame
     
    guessingNum() - Method in class Guesser
    This method requests the user to enter a number between 1 and 10.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class GuesserGame
    The main method is the entry point of the program.

    N

    numGuesser - Variable in class Umpire
    Collects the number guessed by the Guesser/The value returned by the Guesser.guessingNum() method.
    numPlayer1 - Variable in class Umpire
    Collects the number predicted by the Player 1/The value returned by the Player.predictNum() method in the First call.
    numPlayer2 - Variable in class Umpire
    Collects the number predicted by the Player 2/The value returned by the Player.predictNum() method in the Second call.
    numPlayer3 - Variable in class Umpire
    Collects the number predicted by the Player 3/The value returned by the Player.predictNum() method in the Third call.

    P

    Player - Class in Unnamed Package
    This class is responsible for taking the number input from the user and returning it to the caller.
    Player() - Constructor for class Player
     
    pNum - Variable in class Player
    This variable stores the number predicted by the user.
    predictNum() - Method in class Player
    This method requests the user to enter a number between 1 and 10.

    U

    Umpire - Class in Unnamed Package
    This class is responsible for collecting the number(s) from the Guesser and Players + Announces the results.
    Umpire() - Constructor for class Umpire
